name: aggregator processes plugin namespace folders alphabetically
setup:
cat > tree/google/g.yaml << 'EOF'
source:
  id: google
  authoritative_publisher: Google LLC
  authoritative_url: https://example.com/g
  registry_link: STANDARDS-URLS.yaml
  fetched_at: 2026-05-09T08:00:00Z
  content_hash: sha256:g
rules:
  - id: g-rule
    name: g
    description: g rule.
    detector: rubric/detectors/g.sh
recommended_set: [g-rule]
all_set: [g-rule]
EOF

cat > tree/european-union/e.yaml << 'EOF'
source:
  id: eu
  authoritative_publisher: EU
  authoritative_url: https://example.com/e
  registry_link: COMPLIANCE-URLS.yaml
  fetched_at: 2026-05-09T08:00:00Z
  content_hash: sha256:e
rules:
  - id: e-rule
    name: e
    description: e rule.
    detector: rubric/detectors/e.sh
recommended_set: [e-rule]
all_set: [e-rule]
EOF

cat > tree/owasp/o.yaml << 'EOF'
source:
  id: owasp
  authoritative_publisher: OWASP Foundation
  authoritative_url: https://example.com/o
  registry_link: STANDARDS-URLS.yaml
  fetched_at: 2026-05-09T08:00:00Z
  content_hash: sha256:o
rules:
  - id: o-rule
    name: o
    description: o rule.
    detector: rubric/detectors/o.sh
recommended_set: [o-rule]
all_set: [o-rule]
EOF
